name: Secret Detection Patterns
description: Regex patterns for detecting API keys, tokens, and credentials in source code

patterns.name: OpenAI API Key
patterns.description: OpenAI API key (legacy format) detected. Allows billing charges and data access.
patterns.remediation: Remove from code. Store in environment variable. Rotate at platform.openai.com/api-keys.

patterns.name: OpenAI Project API Key
patterns.description: OpenAI project API key detected. Allows billing charges and data access.
patterns.remediation: Remove from code. Store in environment variable. Rotate at platform.openai.com/api-keys.

patterns.name: Anthropic API Key
patterns.description: Anthropic API key detected. Allows billing charges and data access.
patterns.remediation: Remove from code. Store in environment variable. Rotate at console.anthropic.com.

patterns.name: AWS Access Key ID
patterns.description: AWS Access Key ID detected. May allow full AWS account access.
patterns.remediation: Rotate in AWS IAM console. Audit CloudTrail for unauthorized usage. Use IAM roles instead of keys.

patterns.name: AWS Secret Access Key
patterns.description: AWS Secret Access Key detected in configuration.
patterns.remediation: Rotate immediately. Use environment variables or IAM roles.

patterns.name: Google API Key
patterns.description: Google API key detected. Risk depends on API restrictions configured.
patterns.remediation: Review key restrictions in Google Cloud Console. Rotate if unrestricted.

patterns.name: Stripe Secret Key
patterns.description: Stripe secret key detected. sk_live_ allows real payment operations.
patterns.remediation: Roll keys in Stripe Dashboard > Developers > API keys.

patterns.name: Stripe Restricted Key
patterns.description: Stripe restricted key detected.
patterns.remediation: Review key permissions and rotate in Stripe Dashboard.

patterns.name: GitHub Personal Access Token
patterns.description: GitHub Personal Access Token (classic) detected. Allows repository access.
patterns.remediation: Revoke at github.com/settings/tokens and create a new token.

patterns.name: GitHub Fine-Grained Token
patterns.description: GitHub fine-grained personal access token detected.
patterns.remediation: Revoke at github.com/settings/tokens and create a new token.

patterns.name: GitHub OAuth Token
patterns.description: GitHub OAuth app token detected.
patterns.remediation: Revoke the OAuth authorization for the app.

patterns.name: Slack Bot Token
patterns.description: Slack bot token detected. Allows posting messages and accessing workspace data.
patterns.remediation: Regenerate in Slack App settings > OAuth & Permissions.

patterns.name: Slack User Token
patterns.description: Slack user token detected. Allows actions as the user.
patterns.remediation: Regenerate in Slack App settings.

patterns.name: Slack Webhook URL
patterns.description: Slack webhook URL detected. Allows posting to a specific channel.
patterns.remediation: Regenerate webhook URL in Slack App settings > Incoming Webhooks.

patterns.name: Twilio Account SID
patterns.description: Twilio Account SID detected. Not a secret alone but may indicate nearby auth token.
patterns.remediation: Check that the Auth Token is not also exposed.

patterns.name: SendGrid API Key
patterns.description: SendGrid API key detected. Allows sending emails.
patterns.remediation: Revoke and recreate in SendGrid Dashboard > Settings > API Keys.

patterns.name: Mailgun API Key
patterns.description: Mailgun API key detected.
patterns.remediation: Rotate in Mailgun Dashboard > API Keys.

patterns.name: PostgreSQL Connection String
patterns.description: PostgreSQL connection string with credentials detected.
patterns.remediation: Move to environment variable. Change database password. Restrict network access.

patterns.name: MongoDB Connection String
patterns.description: MongoDB connection string with credentials detected.
patterns.remediation: Move to environment variable. Rotate database credentials.

patterns.name: MySQL Connection String
patterns.description: MySQL connection string with credentials detected.
patterns.remediation: Move to environment variable. Rotate database credentials.

patterns.name: Redis Connection String
patterns.description: Redis connection string with password detected.
patterns.remediation: Move to environment variable. Rotate Redis password.

patterns.name: Private Key
patterns.description: Private key detected in source code.
patterns.remediation: Remove immediately. Store in secrets manager or environment variable. Rotate the key pair.

patterns.name: Generic Secret Assignment
patterns.description: Possible hardcoded secret detected. Verify whether this is a real credential or a placeholder.
patterns.remediation: If real, move to environment variable. If placeholder/example, use obviously fake values like 'your-api-key-here'.

patterns.name: Hardcoded Bearer Token
patterns.description: Hardcoded Bearer token in source code.
patterns.remediation: Move token to environment variable. Load at runtime, not at build time.

patterns.name: Supabase Service Role Key
patterns.description: JWT token detected (possibly Supabase service_role key). Service role keys bypass RLS.
patterns.remediation: Verify if this is anon key (safe for frontend) or service_role (server-only). Move service_role to server env var.
